filters.name: LMSPageURLRequested
filters.description:
This filter is triggered when a user loads a page in Studio that references an LMS page, allowing the filter to
        modify the URL of the page requested by the user.

arguments.name: url
arguments.description: the URL of the page to be modified.

arguments.name: org
arguments.description: Course org filter used as context data to get LMS configurations.

returns.description: the modified URL of the page requested by the user.
the course org.

filters.name: AccountSettingsReadOnlyFieldsRequested
filters.description:
This filter is triggered when the account settings API validates which fields
        may be updated for a given user. Pipeline steps may add field names to
        ``readonly_fields`` to mark those fields as read-only for the requesting user.

arguments.name: readonly_fields
arguments.description: the set of field names the caller considers read-only.

arguments.name: user
arguments.description: the Django User whose account settings are being updated.

filters.name: CertificateCreationRequested
filters.description:
This filter is triggered when a user requests a certificate, just before the certificate is created allowing the
        filter to act on the user, course key, mode, status, grade, and generation mode.

arguments.name: user
arguments.description: Django User object.

arguments.name: course_key
arguments.description: course key associated with the certificate.

arguments.name: mode
arguments.description: specifies what kind of certificate.

arguments.name: status
arguments.description: specifies the status of the certificate.

arguments.name: grade
arguments.description: grade of the certificate.

arguments.name: generation_mode
arguments.description: specifies the mode of generation.

returns.description: Django User object.
course key associated with the certificate.
mode of the certificate.
status of the certificate.
grade of the certificate.
mode of generation.

exceptions.name: PreventCertificateCreation
exceptions.description:
Raise to prevent the certificate creation process to continue.

        This exception is propagated from the certificate generation function and handled by the caller to stop the
        certificate creation process before starting the async task.

filters.name: CertificateRenderStarted
filters.description:
This filter is triggered when a user requests to view the certificate, just before the certificate is rendered
        allowing the filter to act on the context and the template used to render the certificate.

arguments.name: context
arguments.description: context dictionary for certificate template.

arguments.name: custom_template
arguments.description: custom web certificate template.

returns.description: context dictionary for the certificate template, possibly modified.
custom web certificate template, possibly modified.

exceptions.name: RedirectToPage
exceptions.description:
Raise to redirect to a different page instead of rendering the certificate.

        This exception is propagated to the certificate view and handled by the view to redirect the user to a new page.

exceptions.name: RenderAlternativeInvalidCertificate
exceptions.description:
Raise to render a different certificate template instead of the default one.

        This exception is propagated to the certificate view and handled by the view to render a different template
        instead.

exceptions.name: RenderCustomResponse
exceptions.description:
Raise to stop the certificate rendering process and return a custom response.

        This exception is propagated to the certificate view and handled by the view to return a custom response
        instead.

filters.name: CohortAssignmentRequested
filters.description:
This filter is triggered when a user is assigned to a cohort, just before the assignment is completed allowing
        the filter to act on the user and the target cohort.

arguments.name: user
arguments.description: Django User object representing the user.

arguments.name: target_cohort
arguments.description: CourseUserGroup instance representing the new user's cohort.

returns.description: Django User object representing the user.
CourseUserGroup instance representing the new user's cohort.

exceptions.name: PreventCohortAssignment
exceptions.description:
Raise to prevent the cohort assignment process to continue.

        This exception is propagated to the assign method and handled by it to stop the cohort assignment process.

filters.name: CohortChangeRequested
filters.description:
This filter is triggered when a user's cohort is changed, just before the change is completed allowing the
        filter to act on the user and the target cohort.

arguments.name: current_membership
arguments.description: CohortMembership instance representing the current user's cohort.

arguments.name: target_cohort
arguments.description: CourseUserGroup instance representing the new user's cohort.

returns.description: CohortMembership instance representing the current user's cohort.
CourseUserGroup instance representing the new user's cohort.

exceptions.name: PreventCohortChange
exceptions.description:
Raise to prevent the cohort change process to continue.

        This exception is propagated to the assign method and handled by it to stop the cohort change process.

filters.name: CourseAboutPageURLRequested
filters.description:
This filter is triggered when a user requests to view the course about page, just before the page is rendered
        allowing the filter to act on the URL of the page and the course org.

arguments.name: url
arguments.description: the URL of the page to be modified.

arguments.name: org
arguments.description: Course org filter used as context data to get LMS configurations.

returns.description: the modified URL of the page.
Course org filter used as context data to get LMS configurations.

filters.name: CourseAboutRenderStarted
filters.description:
This filter is triggered when a user requests to view the course about page, just before the page is rendered
        allowing the filter to act on the context and the template used to render the page.

arguments.name: context
arguments.description: context dictionary for course about template.

arguments.name: template_name
arguments.description: template name to be rendered by the course about.

returns.description: context dictionary for the course about template, possibly modified.
template name to be rendered by the course about, possibly modified.

exceptions.name: RedirectToPage
exceptions.description:
Raise to redirect to a different page instead of rendering the course about.

        This exception is propagated to the course about view and handled by the view to redirect the user to a new
        page.

exceptions.name: RenderInvalidCourseAbout
exceptions.description:
Raise to render a different course about template instead of the default one.

        This exception is propagated to the course about view and handled by the view to render a different template
        instead.

exceptions.name: RenderCustomResponse
exceptions.description:
Raise to stop the course about rendering process and return a custom response.

        This exception is propagated to the course about view and handled by the view to return a custom response
        instead.

filters.name: CourseEnrollmentQuerysetRequested
filters.description:
This filter is triggered when a QuerySet of course enrollments is requested, allowing the filter to act on the
        enrollments data.

arguments.name: enrollments
arguments.description: data with all user's course enrollments.

exceptions.name: PreventEnrollmentQuerysetRequest
exceptions.description: Raise to prevent the course enrollment queryset request to continue.

filters.name: CourseModePriceRequested
filters.description:
This filter is triggered when the price for a course mode checkout needs to be
        calculated. Pipeline steps can adjust the price and apply discounts, like
        enterprise-negotiated pricing.

arguments.name: user
arguments.description: The Django User object.

arguments.name: course_mode_data
arguments.description: The selected course mode object.

arguments.name: price
arguments.description: Price of the course mode in whole currency units (e.g., dollars, not cents).

filters.name: CourseEnrollmentStarted
filters.description:
This filter is triggered when a user initiates the enrollment process, just before the enrollment is completed
        allowing the filter to act on the user, course key, and mode.

arguments.name: user
arguments.description: Django User enrolling in the course.

arguments.name: course_key
arguments.description: course key associated with the enrollment.

arguments.name: mode
arguments.description: specifies what kind of enrollment. The course modes available are: audit, professional,

returns.description: Django User object.
course key associated with the enrollment.
mode of the enrollment.

exceptions.name: PreventEnrollment
exceptions.description:
Raise to prevent the enrollment process to continue.

        This exception is propagated to the course enrollment model and handled by the model to stop the enrollment
        process. All components using the enroll method handle this exception in the appropriate way.

filters.name: CourseEnrollmentViewStarted
filters.description:
This filter is triggered when a user initiates enrollment via the enrollment REST API view,
        just before the enrollment is created, allowing pipeline steps to perform pre-enrollment
        processing scoped to the view layer.

arguments.name: user
arguments.description: Django User enrolling in the course.

arguments.name: course_key
arguments.description: course key associated with the enrollment.

arguments.name: requester_is_backend_service
arguments.description: if request was made by a server with an API key.

returns.description: Django User object.
course key associated with the enrollment.
if request was made by a server with an API key.

exceptions.name: PreventEnrollment
exceptions.description: Raise to prevent the enrollment process from continuing.

filters.name: CourseHomeUrlCreationStarted
filters.description:
This filter is triggered when a course home url is being generated, just before the generation process is
        completed allowing the filter to act on the course key and course home url.

arguments.name: course_key
arguments.description: The course key for which the home url is being requested.

arguments.name: course_home_url
arguments.description: The url string for the course home.

returns.description: The course key for which the home url is being requested.
The url string for the course home.

filters.name: CourseStartDateValidationFailed
filters.description:
Invoked after start-date validation has already failed for the base case,
        allowing pipeline steps to substitute a more specific access-error payload.
        A step that wants to override the default error raises the nested
        ``OverrideStartDateError`` exception; the platform catches i

arguments.name: course_key
arguments.description: the course key for the view being accessed.

arguments.name: start_date
arguments.description: the course start date.

exceptions.name: OverrideStartDateError
exceptions.description:
Raised by a pipeline step to substitute a more specific start-date access error.

        The caller decides whether to surface ``user_message`` in the UI.

filters.name: CourseUnenrollmentStarted
filters.description:
This filter is triggered when a user initiates the unenrollment process, just before the unenrollment is
        completed allowing the filter to act on the user's enrollment in the course.

arguments.name: enrollment
arguments.description: user's enrollment in the course.

exceptions.name: PreventUnenrollment
exceptions.description:
Raised to prevent the unenrollment process to continue.

        This exception is propagated to the course enrollment model and handled by the model to stop the unenrollment
        process. All components using the unenroll method handle this exception in the appropriate way.

filters.name: CoursewareAccessChecksRequested
filters.description:
Invoked from the courseware access-check flow after platform-internal
        checks have passed. Pipeline steps that wish to deny access raise the
        nested ``PreventCoursewareAccess`` exception, which the framework
        propagates back to the caller regardless of ``fail_silently``. Denials

exceptions.name: PreventCoursewareAccess
exceptions.description: Raised by a pipeline step to deny courseware access.

filters.name: CoursewareViewStarted
filters.description:
Invoked before a courseware view renders. A pipeline step that wants to redirect
        the user raises the nested ``RedirectToUrl`` exception with the target URL. The
        platform decorator catches the exception and calls ``django.shortcuts.redirect``.

        The first pipeline step to raise

arguments.name: course_key
arguments.description: the course key for the view being accessed.

arguments.name: view_name
arguments.description: name of the view function being accessed (e.g. 'index', 'progress'),

exceptions.name: RedirectToUrl
exceptions.description: def

filters.name: DashboardRenderStarted
filters.description:
This filter is triggered when a user requests to view the dashboard, just before the page is rendered allowing
        the filter to act on the context and the template used to render the page.

arguments.name: context
arguments.description: context dictionary for student's dashboard template.

arguments.name: template_name
arguments.description: template name to be rendered by the student's dashboard.

returns.description: context dictionary for the student's dashboard template, possibly modified.
template name to be rendered by the student's dashboard, possibly modified.

exceptions.name: RedirectToPage
exceptions.description:
Raise to redirect to a different page instead of rendering the dashboard.

        This exception is propagated to the dashboard view and handled by the view to redirect the user to a new page.

exceptions.name: RenderInvalidDashboard
exceptions.description:
Raise to render a different dashboard template instead of the default one.

        This exception is propagated to the dashboard view and handled by the view to render a different template
        instead.

exceptions.name: RenderCustomResponse
exceptions.description:
Raise to stop the dashboard rendering process and return a custom response.

        This exception is propagated to the dashboard view and handled by the view to return a custom response instead.

filters.name: DiscountEligibilityCheckRequested
filters.description:
This filter is triggered during discount applicability checks, just before the
        final eligibility decision is returned to the caller. Pipeline steps may raise
        ``DiscountIneligible`` to exclude a user from receiving a discount.

arguments.name: user
arguments.description: the Django User being checked for discount eligibility.

arguments.name: course_key
arguments.description: identifies the course.

returns.description: the Django User object (unchanged).
the course key (unchanged).
the (possibly overridden) eligibility flag.

exceptions.name: DiscountIneligible
exceptions.description: Raised by a pipeline step to indicate user is ineligible for discounts

filters.name: GradeEventContextRequested
filters.description:
This filter is triggered when a grade event context is requested, allowing
        pipeline steps to enrich the context dictionary with additional data.

arguments.name: context
arguments.description: The grade event context to be enriched.

arguments.name: user_id
arguments.description: The ID of the user associated with the grade event.

arguments.name: course_id
arguments.description: The identifier of the course.

filters.name: CourseRunAPIRenderStarted
filters.description:
This filter is triggered when a user requests to view the course run API, just before the API is rendered
        allowing the filter to act on the serialized course run data.

arguments.name: serialized_courserun
arguments.description: courserun data.

filters.name: CourseEnrollmentAPIRenderStarted
filters.description:
This filter is triggered when a user requests to view the course enrollment API, just before the API is rendered
        allowing the filter to act on the course key and serialized enrollment data.

arguments.name: course_key
arguments.description: The course key for which isStarted is being modify.

arguments.name: serialized_enrollment
arguments.description: enrollment data.

returns.description: The course key for which isStarted is being modify.
enrollment data.

filters.name: IDVPageURLRequested
filters.description:
This filter is triggered when a user requests to view the ID verification page, just before the page is rendered
        allowing the filter to act on the URL of the page.

arguments.name: url
arguments.description: The url for the ID verification page to be modified.

filters.name: InstructorDashboardRenderStarted
filters.description:
This filter is triggered when an instructor requests to view the dashboard, just before the page is rendered
        allowing the filter to act on the context and the template used to render the page.

        There's a new version of this filter (org.openedx.learning.instructor.dashboard.tabs.reque

arguments.name: context
arguments.description: context dictionary for instructor's tab template.

arguments.name: template_name
arguments.description: template name to be rendered by the instructor's tab.

returns.description: context dictionary for the instructor's tab template, possibly modified.
template name to be rendered by the instructor's tab, possibly modified.

exceptions.name: RedirectToPage
exceptions.description:
Raise to redirect to a different page instead of rendering the instructor dashboard.

        This exception is propagated to the instructor dashboard view and handled by the view to redirect the user to a
        new page.

exceptions.name: RenderInvalidDashboard
exceptions.description:
Raise to render a different instructor dashboard template instead of the default one.

        This exception is propagated to the instructor dashboard view and handled by the view to render a different
        template instead.

exceptions.name: RenderCustomResponse
exceptions.description:
Raise to stop the instructor dashboard rendering process and return a custom response.

        This exception is propagated to the instructor dashboard view and handled by the view to return a custom
        response instead.

filters.name: InstructorDashboardTabsRequested
filters.description:
This filter is triggered when instructor dashboard tabs are generated, allowing plugins
        to add, modify, or remove tabs from the instructor dashboard in the MFE.

        There's an old version of this filter (org.openedx.learning.instructor.dashboard.render.started.v1)
        that applies t

arguments.name: tabs
arguments.description: List of tab dictionaries containing tab_id, title, url, sort_order, etc.

arguments.name: user
arguments.description: Django User object (usually an instructor or staff member).

arguments.name: course_key
arguments.description: Course key for the instructor dashboard.

exceptions.name: PreventTabsGeneration
exceptions.description:
Raise to prevent the normal tabs generation process and optionally provide custom tabs.

        This exception is propagated to the instructor dashboard serializer and handled to stop
        the normal tab generation process. Plugins can provide their own tabs list.

filters.name: ORASubmissionViewRenderStarted
filters.description:
This filter is triggered when a user requests to view the submission, just before the page is rendered allowing
        the filter to act on the context and the template used to render the page.

arguments.name: context
arguments.description: context dictionary for submission view template.

arguments.name: template_name
arguments.description: template name to be rendered by the student's dashboard.

returns.description: context dictionary for the submission view template, possibly modified.
template name to be rendered by the submission view, possibly modified.

exceptions.name: RenderInvalidTemplate
exceptions.description:
Raise to render a different submission view template instead of the default one.

        This exception is propagated to the submission view and handled by the view to render a different template
        instead.

        Arguments:
            message (str): error message for the exception.

filters.name: ScheduleQuerySetRequested
filters.description:
This filter is triggered when a QuerySet of Schedules is requested, allowing the filter to act on the schedules
        data. If you want to know more about the Schedules feature, please refer to the official documentation:
            - https://github.com/openedx/openedx-platform/tree/master/opened

arguments.name: schedules
arguments.description: The original QuerySet of schedules to be filtered.

filters.name: StudentLoginRequested
filters.description:
This filter is triggered when a user tries to log in, just before the login process is completed allowing the
        filter to act on the user object.

arguments.name: user
arguments.description: Django User object trying to log in.

exceptions.name: PreventLogin
exceptions.description:
Raise to prevent the login process to continue.

        This exception is propagated to the login view and handled by the view to stop the login process.

filters.name: AccountSettingsRenderStarted
filters.description:
This filter is triggered when a user visits the account settings page, just before the page is rendered allowing
        the filter to modify the context and the template used to render the page.

arguments.name: context
arguments.description: template context for the account settings page.

arguments.name: template_name
arguments.description: template path used to render the account settings page.

returns.description: context dictionary for the account settings page, possibly modified.
template name to be rendered by the account settings page, possibly modified.

exceptions.name: RedirectToPage
exceptions.description:
Raise to trigger a redirect before the account settings page is rendered.

        This exception is propagated to the account settings view and handled by the view to redirect the user to
        a new page.

exceptions.name: RenderInvalidAccountSettings
exceptions.description:
Raise to render a different template instead of the account settings page.

        This exception is propagated to the account settings view and handled by the view to render a different
        template instead.

exceptions.name: RenderCustomResponse
exceptions.description:
Raise to return a custom response instead of the usual account settings page.

        This exception is propagated to the account settings view and handled by the view to return a custom response
        instead.

filters.name: VerticalBlockChildRenderStarted
filters.description:
This filter is triggered when a child block is about to be rendered within a vertical block, allowing the filter
        to act on the block and the context used to render the child block.

arguments.name: block
arguments.description: the XBlock that is about to be rendered into HTML

arguments.name: context
arguments.description: rendering context values like is_mobile_app, show_title..etc

returns.description: the XBlock that is about to be rendered into HTML
rendering context values like is_mobile_app, show_title..etc

exceptions.name: PreventChildBlockRender
exceptions.description:
Raise to prevent a child block from rendering.

        This exception is propagated to the vertical block view and handled by the view to stop the rendering of the
        child block.

filters.name: VerticalBlockRenderCompleted
filters.description:
This filter is triggered when a vertical block is rendered, just after the rendering process is completed
        allowing the filter to act on the block, fragment, context, and view used to render the vertical block.

arguments.name: block
arguments.description: The VerticalBlock instance which is being rendered.

arguments.name: fragment
arguments.description: The web-fragment containing the rendered content of VerticalBlock.

arguments.name: context
arguments.description: rendering context values like is_mobile_app, show_title..etc.

arguments.name: view
arguments.description: the rendering view. Can be either 'student_view', or 'public_view'.

returns.description: The VerticalBlock instance which is being rendered.
rendering context values like is_mobile_app, show_title..etc.
the rendering view. Can be either 'student_view', or 'public_view'.

exceptions.name: PreventVerticalBlockRender
exceptions.description:
Raise to prevent the vertical block from rendering for the user.

        This exception is propagated to the vertical block view and handled by the view to stop the rendering of the
        vertical block.

filters.name: RenderXBlockStarted
filters.description:
This filter is triggered when an XBlock is about to be rendered, just before the rendering process is completed
        allowing the filter to act on the context and student_view_context used to render the XBlock.

arguments.name: context
arguments.description: rendering context values like is_mobile_app, show_title, etc.

arguments.name: student_view_context
arguments.description: context passed to the student_view of the block context.

returns.description: rendering context values like is_mobile_app, show_title, etc.
context passed to the student_view of the block context.

exceptions.name: PreventXBlockBlockRender
exceptions.description:
Raise to prevent the XBlock from rendering for the user.

        This exception is propagated to the XBlock render view and handled by the view to stop the rendering of the
        XBlock.

exceptions.name: RenderCustomResponse
exceptions.description:
Raise to stop the XBlock rendering process by returning a custom response.

        This exception is propagated to the XBlock render view and handled by the view to return a custom response
        instead.
